sql.query: SELECT w.id,w.workflowName,w.locationId,w.spaceId,w.configurationId,l.locationName,s.spaceName,c.configurationName FROM tbl_workflows w LEFT JOIN tbl_locations l ON l.id=w.locationId AND l.tenantId=w.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_spaces s ON s.id=w.spaceId AND s.tenantId=w.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_space_configurations c ON c.id=w.configurationId AND c.tenantId=w.tenantId WHERE w.id=:workflowId AND w.tenantId=:tenantId LIMIT 1

UPDATE tbl_workflows w SET w.locationId=(SELECT l.id FROM tbl_locations l WHERE l.id=NULLIF(:locationId,'') AND l.tenantId=w.tenantId LIMIT 1),w.spaceId=(SELECT s.id FROM tbl_spaces s WHERE s.id=NULLIF(:spaceId,'') AND s.locationId=NULLIF(:locationId2,'') AND s.tenantId=w.tenantId LIMIT 1),w.configurationId=(SELECT c.id FROM tbl_space_configurations c WHERE c.id=NULLIF(:configurationId,'') AND c.spaceId=NULLIF(:spaceId2,'') AND c.tenantId=w.tenantId LIMIT 1),w.modifiedDate=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE w.id=:workflowId AND w.tenantId=:tenantId

SELECT w.locationId,w.spaceId,w.configurationId,l.locationName,s.spaceName,c.configurationName FROM tbl_workflows w LEFT JOIN tbl_locations l ON l.id=w.locationId AND l.tenantId=w.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_spaces s ON s.id=w.spaceId AND s.tenantId=w.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_space_configurations c ON c.id=w.configurationId AND c.tenantId=w.tenantId WHERE w.id=:workflowId AND w.tenantId=:tenantId LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO tbl_activity_log (tenantId,userId,workflowId,entityType,entityId,actionType,summary,beforeJson,afterJson,createdDate) VALUES (:tenantId,:userId,:workflowId,'workflow',:entityId,'workflow.location_changed',CONCAT(:actor,' changed the location for ',:workflowName),JSON_OBJECT('locationId',:oldLocationId,'locationName',:oldLocationName,'spaceId',:oldSpaceId,'spaceName',:oldSpaceName,'configurationId',:oldConfigurationId,'configurationName',:oldConfigurationName),JSON_OBJECT('locationId',:newLocationId,'locationName',:newLocationName,'spaceId',:newSpaceId,'spaceName',:newSpaceName,'configurationId',:newConfigurationId,'configurationName',:newConfigurationName),CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
